message:
🐛 Fix auth smoke test failure (#10795)

Remove read-only GET/HEAD localhost exemption from validateToken() that
allowed unauthenticated curl requests to bypass KC_AGENT_TOKEN auth.
The exemption returned 200 instead of 401 for GET /deployments without
a Bearer token, breaking the auth smoke test contract.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
